calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: MECH-189/DEV-NEED-006 trained-encoder adult z_goal 0.4 absolute-crossing EVIDENCE (claim-tagged successor to diagnostic 588d; closes infant_substrate:GAP-11b)
items.note: Claim-tagged EVIDENCE successor to the diagnostic V3-EXQ-588d (claim_ids=[], scoring-excluded), over the SAME 588c/588d forced-feed single-anchor + P0 trained-encoder harness (copied verbatim; only experiment_purpose evidence + claim_ids changed). Owner of infant_substrate:GAP-11b (gov 2026-06-23T22:14Z drift). LOAD-BEARING C_CROSS = ARM_ON adult median z_goal.norm > 0.4 on >=2/3 seeds (the DEV-NEED-006 blocking gate). 588d confirmed readiness (on_mean_adult_zgoal 0.4439, frac_on_cross 1.0, encoder trained 3/3, OFF 0.0). RE-DERIVE BRAKE on MECH-189 (2 autopsies: 588_2026-05-19, 669a_2026-06-13) -- RELEASED: (a) NOT the braked 669 context-diversity line -- the 588 forced-feed single-anchor harness bypasses both 669a ecological-contact starvation and 669b nursery anchor-store saturation, testing a DIFFERENT root (untrained-encoder z_world-magnitude artifact); (b) required substrate BUILT (MECH-189 SuperOrdinalGoalMemory ree-v3 2026-06-09 + SD-018 trained encoder) with 588d the validated readiness evidence; the MECH-189 claim entry itself routes the DEV-NEED-006 absolute gate to 'a TRAINED-ENCODER evidence successor' = this run. User-adjudicated brake-exempt 2026-06-23. evidence_direction_per_claim emitted (multi-claim rule); readiness-unmet self-routes substrate_not_ready_requeue + non_degenerate=False (scoring-excluded), NEVER a false weakens. NOTE: DEV-NEED-006 is a developmental-need gate (developmental_needs_register.md z_goal>0.4), not a standalone claims.yaml id -- only MECH-189 accrues scored evidence; the DEV-NEED-006 tag documents the gate this run validates. PASS -> /governance applies MECH-189/DEV-NEED-006 evidence + closes GAP-11b (status done) + clears pending_retest_after_substrate (separate session). Smoke 2026-06-23 PASS (dry-scale FAIL/0.259 expected on toy 2-ep P0; readiness path frac_encoder_trained 1.0; validate_experiments --strict --paths OK incl arm-fingerprint; no manifest leak).

items.title: ARC-108 sec-7 learned-gating settling C3 (test-design-fixed re-run of 700/700a)
items.note: Test-design-fixed re-run of the ARC-108 sec-7 learned-gating MECH-439 F-dominance falsifier; routed by failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-700-cluster_2026-06-23 (700 SELECTION 2x2 + 700a C3 both FAILed on a BRITTLE HARNESS, not the claims). Harness fixes: (1) verified-lifting noise bar NOISE_FLOOR_ALPHA 1.0->2.0 kept as a precondition; (2) per-seed-divergent gating (interpret C1/C2/C3 only on divergent seeds, 701a-style, so a degenerate monostrategy cell self-excludes); (3) 6 seeds; (4) focus the settling arm (A2/A3, drop the below-noise w_chan-only A1); (5) fold C3 signed-vs-unsigned-RPE (learned_channel_rpe_mode) in as arms. Positive 700 signal: clean divergent seed 42 -> learned settling (MECH-450 W_lat) lifted committed-class entropy +0.25 over A0 and beat noise; settling is the lever. Matched constant on ALL arms (do NOT toggle): landed arithmetic envelope use_f_eligibility_demotion + adaptive_floor (689e) + use_go_nogo_constitution (689g) + modulatory-authority/top_k k=3 (569i), use_differentiable_cem=False (SD-055 safety). Env reef-bipartite foraging size 12 hazard_food_attraction 0.7; phased P0(e2-train)/P1(bias REINFORCE)/P2(measure). Re-derive brake on MECH-439 (4 autopsies) + ARC-108 (2): EXEMPT per the autopsy (fired:false, user-adjudicated) + standard release path (ARC-108/MECH-450 substrate IMPLEMENTED 2026-06-20/22) -- do NOT re-trip. PRE-REGISTER decisive-or-escalate: STILL no conversion with a now-verified noise bar + per-seed gating -> route to V4 full BG-thalamo-cortical loop (no_lift_preconditions_met_escalate_v4_full_loop), NOT another V3 letter; preconditions-unmet self-routes substrate_not_ready_requeue. Governance: MECH-439 stays substrate_ceiling; ARC-108/MECH-450 stay substrate_conditional; pending_retest_after_substrate; PROMOTES NOTHING. Smoke 2026-06-23: 5/5 arms run end-to-end incl unsigned-RPE path; self-routes substrate_not_ready at toy scale (correct), no manifest leak.

items.title: Closure-plane commit-ENTRY primitive readiness (HARNESS-FIX re-issue of 460m; z_goal seeded in eval loop): does use_closure_commit_entry arm + sustain a closure-formed occupancy with zero F-commits? (2-arm diagnostic)
items.note: HARNESS-FIX RE-ISSUE of V3-EXQ-460m (supersedes it). rung-6 of f_dominance_conversion_ceiling / commitment_closure:GAP-4. CLAIM-FREE substrate-readiness diagnostic (claim_ids=[]; experiment_purpose=diagnostic; PROMOTES NOTHING, no governance weight). Routed by failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-460m-460n_2026-06-23 (confirmed, user-routed): 460m FAILed substrate_not_ready_requeue / precondition_unmet because the _eval_arm_behaviour loop NEVER called agent.update_z_goal -> goal_state.is_active() False every tick -> the F-independent SET predicate's precondition (closure_rule_directed_commit_formed) was starved -> n_rule_directed_commit_ticks=0 on every seed (rule_state_norm_peak 0.31-7.59 >> the 0.01 floor; only the goal-active half was missing). NOT the 460k structural-unreachability root (the F-independent writer EXISTS at agent.py:6519-6532, 84c1e7c) and NOT a substrate ceiling (z_goal seeding demonstrably works on the same trained agent -- foraging_contact_guard PASSED in run_p2). FIX: seed z_goal each eval step (consumption-gated, mirroring scaffolded_sd054_onboarding run_p2 / _eval_episode: benefit=obs_body[11], drive=clip(1-energy,0,1); _clone_arm now also copies the trained substrate's live GoalConfig calibration onto the clone). EVERYTHING ELSE IDENTICAL: same closure_exclusive_decommit_eval substrate, same 2 arms (ARM_ENTRY_OFF / ARM_ENTRY_ON), same gate-a armed_and_sustained, same self-route guards. PROMOTES NOTHING; recommended_substrate_queue_entry.action=none (no create/amend on f_dominance_conversion_ceiling). Re-derive brake does NOT apply (claim-free). The de-commit falsifier successor stays GATED on this readiness re-issue scoring a contributory PASS. Design doc: REE_assembly/docs/architecture/natural_commit_occupancy_release.md (closure-plane commit-ENTRY primitive amend section). Unit contract: ree-v3/tests/contracts/test_closure_commit_entry.py (C3 C-KEY). validate_experiments --strict --paths OK; dry-run smoke clean (2 arms end-to-end; the fix took effect -- n_rule_directed_commit_ticks 32/59 vs the predecessor's 0; toy-scale occupancy latch not yet armed, as expected -- the full-scale run gives gate-a a fair test). Do NOT re-author 460d/e/f/g/h/i/j/k/l/m.

items.title: Closure-plane commit-ENTRY TRAJECTORY readiness + bool-vs-trajectory comparison (HARNESS-FIX re-issue of 460n; z_goal seeded in eval loop): does use_closure_commit_entry_trajectory STEP a closure-formed committed program the bool latch cannot? (3-arm diagnostic)
items.note: HARNESS-FIX RE-ISSUE of V3-EXQ-460n (supersedes it). rung-6 of f_dominance_conversion_ceiling / commitment_closure:GAP-4. NOT the 460k structural root (the F-independent writers EXIST: 84c1e7c bool, 96ee30c trajectory) and NOT a substrate ceiling. EVERYTHING ELSE IDENTICAL: same closure_exclusive_decommit_eval substrate, same 3 arms (ARM_ENTRY_OFF / ARM_BOOL / ARM_TRAJECTORY), gate-a occupancy on BOTH latch arms + gate-b C-STEP traj_steps_program (ARM_TRAJECTORY closure_program_steps_total>0 while ARM_BOOL==0), same self-route guards.
